name: Basic Fact Retention
description: Tests recall of compound facts planted conversationally, with indirect queries that require synthesis.

facts.content: My name is José and I'm originally from Barcelona
facts.planted_as: By the way, my name is José and I'm originally from Barcelona.

facts.content: I moved to Copenhagen about three years ago for work
facts.planted_as: I moved to Copenhagen about three years ago for work.

facts.content: I have a severe peanut allergy and carry an EpiPen
facts.planted_as: Oh, I should mention — I have a severe peanut allergy. I carry an EpiPen everywhere.

facts.content: Meeting my manager Sarah at 3pm tomorrow to discuss Q2 roadmap
facts.planted_as: I'm meeting my manager Sarah at 3pm tomorrow to discuss the Q2 roadmap.

facts.content: I strongly prefer email over Slack for important matters
facts.planted_as: Just so you know, I strongly prefer email over Slack for anything important.

facts.content: My dog Max is a 4-year-old golden retriever
facts.planted_as: My dog Max is a 4-year-old golden retriever — he's the best.

facts.content: Taking an online machine learning course on weekends
facts.planted_as: I'm taking an online course in machine learning on weekends.

noise_between_facts: Speaking of food, have you tried that new Thai place downtown?
I was reading about climate change yesterday. Fascinating stuff.
Do you think remote work will remain popular long-term?
The traffic this morning was absolutely terrible.
I need to remember to pick up groceries later.

queries.question: What health concerns should you keep in mind when suggesting food for me?
If someone needed to reach me urgently about work, what communication channel should they use?
I need to prepare for a meeting — who am I meeting, when, and what's it about?
Tell me what you know about my living situation and background
What do you know about my personal life outside of work?

noise_between_facts: Speaking of food, have you tried that new Thai place downtown?
I was reading about climate change yesterday. Fascinating stuff.
Do you think remote work will remain popular long-term?
The traffic this morning was absolutely terrible.
I need to remember to pick up groceries later.
My neighbor just got a new puppy. It's so cute but barks constantly.
I've been thinking about redecorating my apartment, maybe some plants.
Did you catch that documentary on Netflix? Everyone's talking about it.
My gym is offering a discount on annual memberships this month.
The weather forecast says rain tomorrow, might need an umbrella.
I tried a new coffee shop last Tuesday, their espresso was perfect.
My phone has been acting weird lately, maybe a software update issue.
My manager just got back from a trip to Sacramento — said the weather was perfect.
The Seattle office is hiring 3 new marketing people, Sarah from HR told me.
I saw on LinkedIn that someone named Sandra just moved to San Francisco.
There's a nursing conference in San Diego next month, my aunt Sofia is presenting.
Our building lawyer Steve is handling the HOA dispute with the adjacent property.
My running club friend is doing the Portland half-marathon — she's aiming for 1:45.

facts.content: My sister Ana lives in Madrid and works as a doctor
facts.planted_as: I was on a video call with my sister Ana last night — she's been absolutely swamped at the hospital in Madrid. Being a doctor there during flu season sounds brutal.

facts.content: I'm lactose intolerant but can handle small amounts of cheese
facts.planted_as: Funny story — I ordered a big bowl of cream pasta at that work lunch yesterday and spent the entire afternoon regretting it. I'm lactose intolerant, though weirdly I can handle small amounts of cheese without issues. Just not a whole bowl of cream sauce.

facts.content: My WiFi password at home is BlueOcean42
facts.planted_as: Hey, my neighbor just moved in and needed internet access. I shared our WiFi with them — the password is BlueOcean42. Reminded me I should probably change it soon.

facts.content: I spend weekends rock climbing at the gym near Nørrebro
facts.planted_as: I had the most amazing weekend — dragged myself to the climbing gym near Nørrebro even though it was pouring rain outside. Three hours on the wall and my forearms are still screaming. Totally worth it though.

facts.content: I graduated from Technical University of Denmark with a degree in Software Engineering
facts.planted_as: I studied at the Technical University of Denmark — got my degree in Software Engineering.

facts.content: My best friend from Barcelona is named Pau and he works in marketing in London
facts.planted_as: My best friend from Barcelona is named Pau. He moved to London for a marketing job.

facts.content: My apartment is on the 4th floor of a building on Vesterbrogade street
facts.planted_as: I live on the 4th floor of a building on Vesterbrogade — nice area but the stairs are brutal.

facts.content: I'm training for the Copenhagen Half Marathon in September
facts.planted_as: I'm training for the Copenhagen Half Marathon in September. It'll be my first one.

facts.content: My blood type is O negative and I donate regularly
facts.planted_as: By the way, my blood type is O negative. I try to donate blood regularly since it's universal.

facts.content: My manager Sarah previously worked at Google before joining our startup
facts.planted_as: Fun fact — my manager Sarah actually worked at Google before joining our startup.

facts.content: I'm allergic to penicillin but can take amoxicillin as an alternative
facts.planted_as: Oh, I should also mention — I'm allergic to penicillin, but my doctor says amoxicillin is fine as an alternative.

facts.content: My passport expires in November 2026 and I need to renew it before a trip to Japan
facts.planted_as: My passport expires in November 2026 and I need to renew it before my trip to Japan planned for December.

facts.content: I use the Revolut bank card ending in 4738 as my primary payment method
facts.planted_as: I primarily use my Revolut card — the one ending in 4738 — for everything.

facts.content: I'm training for a race next month
facts.planted_as: I've been waking up at 5am every day to train — got a big race next month and I want to be ready.

facts.content: The marathon is in Portland
facts.planted_as: By the way, the race is actually a marathon in Portland. I've never been there so it'll be a fun trip too.

facts.content: My goal is sub-4-hours for the marathon
facts.planted_as: My coach says sub-4-hours is ambitious for a first marathon but I'm going for it. I've been hitting the pace in training.

facts.content: I'm building a home office in the spare bedroom
facts.planted_as: I've decided to convert the spare bedroom into a proper home office. Tired of working from the kitchen table.

facts.content: I ordered a standing desk for the home office
facts.planted_as: Just ordered a standing desk — the Uplift V2. Should arrive next week for the new office setup.

facts.content: The home office will also be a music recording space with soundproofing
facts.planted_as: I'm adding soundproofing panels too — planning to use the home office as a music recording space in the evenings. Guitar mostly.

facts.content: My colleague Sarah lives in Seattle and works in marketing
facts.planted_as: My colleague Sarah just moved to Seattle — she's heading up the marketing team there. We still collaborate on projects remotely.

facts.content: My sister Sandra lives in Sacramento and works as a teacher
facts.planted_as: My sister Sandra has been in Sacramento for about five years now. She teaches third grade and absolutely loves it.

facts.content: My friend Sam lives in San Francisco and works at a startup
facts.planted_as: My buddy Sam is out in San Francisco — he's working at some AI startup. We try to catch up every few months.

facts.content: My cousin Sofia lives in San Diego and works as a nurse
facts.planted_as: My cousin Sofia is down in San Diego. She's been a nurse at the children's hospital there for about three years.

facts.content: My neighbor Steve lives in the same building and works as a lawyer
facts.planted_as: My neighbor Steve — he's a lawyer, lives two floors up from me — invited me over for dinner last weekend. Nice guy.

facts.content: I have 2 cats at home
facts.planted_as: Yeah, I have 2 cats at home. They're a handful but I love them.

facts.content: I went to college in the Midwest
facts.planted_as: I went to college somewhere in the Midwest — feels like a lifetime ago.

queries.question: What dietary restrictions should I be aware of for both food and drinks?
I'm traveling to Spain next month. Do I have anyone there I could visit?
A guest is visiting and needs to connect their laptop at my place. What do they need to know?
I want to plan a weekend activity that matches my existing fitness routine. What do I already do?
Where did you study and what was your field?
Tell me about your closest friends — where are they from and what do they do?
Given your dietary restrictions and your meeting with Sarah tomorrow, what specific accommodations would be needed if the Q2 roadmap discussion happens over a working lunch?
My physical therapist wants to know about my upcoming athletic commitments — what event, where, and what time am I targeting?
Describe the home office project I've been working on — what furniture did I order, what room is it in, and what else will I use the space for?
I'm planning a trip to the US West Coast and want to visit people I know. Who lives where?
Between the marathon training and the home office project, what am I spending my mornings and evenings on?
I need to ship a birthday gift to my sister. What city should I send it to?
I'm looking for someone who understands the startup world to give me career advice. Which of my friends fits that profile and where are they?
Which of my contacts works in healthcare and where do they live?
What are my cats' names and how old are they?
Which university did I attend and what was my major?

facts.content: My car is parked in lot B, spot 247
facts.planted_as: Oh, my car is parked in lot B, spot 247 today.

facts.content: I have a dentist appointment next Tuesday at 2:30pm
facts.planted_as: I have a dentist appointment next Tuesday at 2:30pm, don't let me forget.

facts.content: My coffee order is a flat white with oat milk
facts.planted_as: Could you grab me a coffee if you're going? My usual is a flat white with oat milk.
facts.assistant_response: Flat white with oat milk — got it! I'll remember your usual order.

facts.content: I keep my spare apartment key in a magnetic box behind the mailbox
facts.planted_as: In case I ever lock myself out — I keep a spare key in a magnetic box behind the mailbox downstairs.
facts.assistant_response: That's good to know — spare key in a magnetic box behind the mailbox. I'll remember that in case you need it.

queries.question: I need to move my vehicle before the lot closes. Where exactly is it?
I'm trying to schedule a team dinner this week. Are there any time conflicts I should watch for?
If you were making a lunch plan for me, what would you need to consider about my dietary needs, and what drink would I want alongside the meal?
I'm locked out of my apartment. Do you remember if I mentioned any backup plan for this?
